pageTitle: Imigaqo Yokusetyenziswa kunye nePolisi yaBucala ye-VirtualMD.app

termsOfUse.title: Imigaqo Yokusetyenziswa
termsOfUse.welcome: Wamkelekile kwi-VirtualMD.app ("iNkonzo", "iSayithi"), eqhutywa yi-MindScript Technologies, LLC ("MindScript", "thina", "wethu"). Le Migaqo Yokusetyenziswa ("iMigaqo") ilawula ukufikelela kwakho kunye nokusetyenziswa kwewebhusayithi yethu, ii-personas ze-AI, umxholo, kunye neenkonzo. Ngokufikelela okanye ukusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukubotshelelwa yile Migaqo kunye nePolisi yethu yaBucala. Ukuba awuvumelani nale Migaqo, musa ukusebenzisa iNkonzo.

serviceDescription.title: 1. Inkcazo yeNkonzo
serviceDescription.content: I-VirtualMD.app inika ukufikelela kwii-personas ze-AI eziphucukileyo eziyilelwe ukunika ulwazi olunxulumene nempilo kunye neembono ezisekelwe kuncwadi lwezonyango, izikhokelo zeklinikhi, kunye nedatha yoqeqesho lwe-AI. INkonzo yenzelwe IINJONGO ZOLWAZI KUNYE NEZEMFUNDO KUPHELA kwaye AYISOSITHOMBO sonyango lobuchwephesha, ukuxilongwa okanye unyango. Kufuneka ubonisane nabasebenzi bezempilo abaqinisekisiweyo ngaphambi kokuthatha naziphi na izigqibo zempilo ezisekelwe kulwazi olufunyenwe kwiNkonzo yethu.

acceptanceOfTerms.title: 2. Ukwamkelwa kweMigaqo
acceptanceOfTerms.content: Ngokubhalisa, ukufikelela, ukukhangela okanye ukusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuba ufundile, uyiqonda kwaye uyavuma ukubotshelelwa yile Migaqo. Umele ukuba uneminyaka esemthethweni yokwenza isivumelwano esisebenzayo. Ukusetyenziswa kwakho kweNkonzo kuyityikityo lakho le-elektroniki kule Migaqo.

eligibility.title: 3. Ukufaneleka
eligibility.ageRequirement: Ukusebenzisa iNkonzo ye-VirtualMD.app, kufuneka ube ubuncinane uneminyaka eli-18 ubudala okanye ubudala obusemthethweni kulawulo lwakho, nokuba yeyiphi enkulu. Ukuba usebenzisa iNkonzo egameni lombutho, umele kwaye uqinisekisa ukuba unamandla okubopha loo mbutho kule Migaqo.
eligibility.legalCapacity: Kufuneka kwakhona ube namandla asemthethweni okungena kule Migaqo. Awunakufikelela okanye usebenzise iNkonzo ukuba uthintelwe ekufumaneni iinkonzo phantsi komthetho osebenzayo okanye ukuba ubekade unqunyanyisiwe okanye ususiwe kwiNkonzo yi-MindScript.
eligibility.territorialRestrictions: Ukufikelela kwiNkonzo ukusuka kwimimandla apho umxholo okanye ukusetyenziswa kwayo kungekho mthethweni kuthintelwe ngokungqongqo. Kufuneka usebenzise iNkonzo kuphela ngokuhambelana nemithetho yelizwe lakho kunye nolawulo lwakho. Abasebenzisi banoxanduva lokuhambelana nayo yonke imithetho yendawo, imithetho kunye nemimiselo malunga nokusetyenziswa kwabo kweNkonzo, kubandakanywa nezo zinxulumene nokuziphatha kwi-intanethi, umxholo owamkelekileyo kunye nolwazi lwezempilo.

userAccounts.title: 4. Iiakhawunti Zabasebenzisi kunye noBhaliso
userAccounts.registrationRequirements: Kungafuneka ubhalise kwaye wenze iakhawunti ukufikelela kwiimpawu ezithile zeNkonzo. Xa ubhalisa, uyavuma ukunika ulwazi oluchanekileyo, lwangoku nolupheleleyo ngawe kwaye ugcine kwaye uhlaziye ngokukhawuleza ulwazi lweakhawunti yakho.
userAccounts.accountSecurity: Unoxanduva lokugcina imfihlo yeenkcukacha zeakhawunti yakho kunye nayo yonke imisebenzi eyenzeka phantsi kweakhawunti yakho. Uyavuma ukwazisa i-MindScript ngokukhawuleza malunga nakuphi na ukusetyenziswa okungagunyaziswanga kweakhawunti yakho okanye naluphi na olunye ulwaphulo lokhuseleko. I-MindScript ayizukuba noxanduva lwayo nayiphi na ilahleko okanye umonakalo ovela ekusileleleni kwakho ukukhusela ulwazi lweakhawunti yakho.
userAccounts.accountTermination: I-MindScript igcina ilungelo lokunqumamisa okanye lokuphelisa iiakhawunti ezaphula le Migaqo okanye nganye na esinye isizathu ngokubona kwethu.
userAccounts.singleAccount: Umsebenzisi ngamnye angagcina iakhawunti enye kuphela. Ukwenza iiakhawunti ezininzi kumsebenzisi omnye kuthintelwe ngaphandle kokuba kuvunyelwe ngokucacileyo yi-MindScript.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Amalungelo Obunini beNgqondo
intellectualProperty.ownershipRights: INkonzo kunye nawo wonke umxholo wayo, iimpawu, kunye nokusebenza (kubandakanywa kodwa kungaphelelanga kuzo zonke iinkcukacha, isoftware, umbhalo, imiboniso, imifanekiso, ividiyo, umsindo, kunye noyilo, ukukhetha, kunye nokulungelelaniswa kwazo) ngabanini yi-MindScript Technologies, LLC, abanikizelisi bayo, okanye abanye ababoneleli bezinto ezinjalo kwaye bakhuselwe ngamalungelo okushicilela ase-United States nawamazwe ngamazwe, uphawu lorhwebo, ilungelo elilodwa lomenzi, imfihlo yorhwebo, kunye namanye amalungelo obunini bengqondo okanye amalungelo obunini.
intellectualProperty.limitedLicense: Ngokuxhomekeke ekuthotyeleni kwakho le Migaqo, i-MindScript ikunika ilayisensi elinganiselweyo, engeyiyo eyodwa, engenakudluliselwa, engenakufumana ilayisensi engaphantsi, erhoxisekayo yokufikelela nokusebenzisa iNkonzo kuphela ukusetyenziswa kwakho kobuqu, okungeyiyo eyorhwebo.
intellectualProperty.prohibitedUses: Ngaphandle kokuba kuvunyelwe ngokucacileyo kule Migaqo, awunakuvelisa kwakhona, usasaze, uguqule, wenze imisebenzi ephuma kuyo, ubonise esidlangalaleni, wenze esidlangalaleni, uphinde ushicilele, ukhuphele, ugcine, okanye udlulisele nayiphi na into ekwiNkonzo yethu ngaphandle kwemvume yangaphambili ebhaliweyo ye-MindScript.
intellectualProperty.userContent: Ngokufaka, ukuposa okanye ukubonisa umxholo kwiNkonzo okanye ngayo, unika i-MindScript ilayisensi yehlabathi jikelele, engeyiyo eyodwa, engenantlawulo yokusebenzisa, ukuvelisa kwakhona, ukuguqula, ukulungelelanisa, ukupapasha, ukuguqulela, ukwenza imisebenzi ephuma kuyo, ukusasaza nokubonisa umxholo onjalo ngeenjongo zokusebenza nokuphucula iNkonzo.
intellectualProperty.feedback: Naziphi na iimpendulo, amagqabantshintshi okanye iingcebiso onokuzenza malunga neNkonzo ziyavolontiya ngokupheleleyo kwaye siya kuba sikhululekile ukusebenzisa iimpendulo ezinjalo, amagqabantshintshi okanye iingcebiso njengoko sibona kufanelekile ngaphandle kwaso nasiphi na isibophelelo kuwe.

acceptableUse.title: Umgaqo-nkqubo Wokusetyenziswa Okwamkelekileyo
acceptableUse.intro: Uyavuma ukusebenzisa i-VirtualMD.app kuphela ngeenjongo ezisemthethweni nangokuhambelana nale Migaqo. Uyavuma ukungasebenzisi iNkonzo:

unlawful.title: Kuyo nayiphi na injongo engekho mthethweni
unlawful.description: Kubandakanywa ukwaphula nawuphi na umthetho okanye ummiselo osebenzayo wombuso, welizwe, wendawo okanye wamazwe ngamazwe.

harmOthers.title: Ukonzakalisa okanye ukuzama ukonzakalisa abanye
harmOthers.description: Kubandakanywa kodwa kungaphelelanga ekusebenziseni ulwazi oluphuma kwiNkonzo ukwenza umonakalo womzimba, weemvakalelo okanye wengqondo kuye nawuphi na umntu.

harmAnimals.title: Ukonzakalisa okanye ukuzama ukonzakalisa izilwanyana
harmAnimals.description: Kubandakanywa ukusebenzisa iNkonzo ukufumana ulwazi olujolise ekwenzeni ukubandezeleka, ukulimala okanye ukufa kwaso nasiphi na isilwanyana.

advertising.title: Ukudlulisa, okanye ukufumana ukuthunyelwa, kwayo nayiphi na into yokuthengisa okanye yokukhuthaza
advertising.description: Ngaphandle kwemvume yethu yangaphambili ebhaliweyo, kubandakanywa nayo nayiphi na 'imeyile engafunwayo', 'ileta yotyathyatho', 'i-spam', okanye naso nasiphi na esinye isicelo esifanayo.

impersonate.title: Ukuzenza okanye ukuzama ukuzenza i-MindScript
impersonate.description: Umsebenzi we-MindScript, omnye umsebenzisi, okanye nawuphi na omnye umntu okanye iqumrhu.

nefarious.title: Ngeenjongo ezimbi zalo naluphi na uhlobo
nefarious.description: Uyavuma ngokucacileyo ukungasebenzisi iNkonzo ukukhangela ulwazi, isikhokelo okanye iindlela ezinxulumene nokwenza ingozi kuwe okanye kwabanye. Oku kubandakanya, kodwa akuphelelanga ekukhangeleni iindlela zokuzenzakalisa, ubundlobongela, imisebenzi engekho mthethweni, okanye nasiphi na isenzo esinokubeka emngciphekweni wena okanye omnye umntu. Ukusebenzisa iqonga ngeenjongo ezinjalo kukwaphula le Migaqo kwaye kungakhokelela ekuphelisweni kweakhawunti ngokukhawuleza kunye nokubikwa kubaphathi abafanelekileyo ukuba kuyafaneleka.

interference.title: Ngayo nayiphi na indlela ephazamisa ukusebenza okufanelekileyo kweNkonzo
interference.description: Kubandakanywa ukwazisa iintsholongwane, amahashe eTrojan, iimbungu, iibhombu zengqiqo okanye ezinye izinto ezinobuqhophololo okanye eziyingozi ngokwezobuchwepheshe; ukuzama ukufumana ukufikelela okungagunyaziswanga, ukuphazamisa, ukonakalisa, okanye ukuphazamisa nayiphi na indawo yeNkonzo, iseva apho iNkonzo igcinwe khona, okanye nasiphi na iseva, ikhompyutha, okanye i-database exhunywe kwiNkonzo.

asIs.title: 1. INkonzo Ibonelelwa "NJENGOKO INJALO"; KULWAZI KUPHELA
asIs.content: Ulwazi kunye neenkonzo ezibonelelwa yi-VirtualMD.app, kubandakanywa wonke umxholo owenziwe zii-personas ze-AI, zibonelelwa "NJENGOKO ZINJALO" kunye "NJENGOKO ZIFUMANEKA" KWIINJONGO ZOLWAZI KUNYE NEZEMFUNDO KUPHELA. I-MindScript ayenzi zingxelo okanye ziqinisekiso zalo naluphi na uhlobo, ezicacileyo okanye ezifikelelweyo, malunga nokusebenza kweNkonzo okanye ulwazi, umxholo, izinto okanye iimveliso ezibandakanywe kwiNkonzo. Uyavuma ngokucacileyo ukuba ukusetyenziswa kwakho kweNkonzo kungumngcipheko wakho wedwa.
asIs.warning: I-VirtualMD.app IBONELELA NGOLWAZI KUPHELA. AYISOSISIMILO sengcebiso yonyango lobuchwepheshe, ukuxilongwa okanye unyango oluvela kumnikezeli wezempilo oqeqeshiweyo. Kufuneka ubonisane nochwepheshe wezempilo oqinisekisiweyo ngaphambi kokuthatha naliphi na inyathelo elisekelwe kulwazi oluvela kwiNkonzo yethu. Soloko ufuna iingcebiso zogqirha wakho okanye omnye umnikezi wezempilo oqeqeshiweyo malunga nemibuzo onokuba nayo malunga nemeko yezempilo. Ungaze ungahoye iingcebiso zonyango lobuchwepheshe okanye ulibazise ukuzifuna ngenxa yento oyifundileyo okanye odibene nayo kwiNkonzo.
asIs.limitations: I-MindScript ayiboneleli ngokuxilongwa kwezonyango okanye unyango. Umxholo owenziwe yi-AI unokuba neempazamo okanye izinto ezishiyiweyo nangona sineenkqubo zethu zokuqinisekisa. Unyango lwezempilo lufuna uvavanyo lobuqu ngabasebenzi bezempilo abagunyazisiweyo. Ulwazi lwezempilo lunokuba ludala. Imbali yakho yezonyango eyodwa ifuna uvavanyo lobuchwepheshe. INkonzo ayinakuthatha indawo yobuchule, ukugweba kunye nokhathalelo lwabaqeqeshi bezonyango.
asIs.fdaWarning: INkonzo, umxholo wayo, kunye nee-personas zayo ze-AI AZIVUNYWANGA yi-U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) okanye nawuphi na omnye umzimba olawulayo njengesixhobo sonyango okanye ngeenjongo zokuxilonga okanye zonyango.

noHipaa.title: 2. Akukho Kuthobela i-HIPAA Kusetyenziso Jikelele
noHipaa.content: Uyavuma ngokucacileyo kwaye uyavuma ukuba i-VirtualMD.app, kunikezelo lwayo lwenkonzo ejolise kubathengi ngokubanzi, AYIYONKONZO EHAMBELANA NE-HIPAA ngeenjongo zokusetyenziswa kwamaqumrhu agqunyethwe yi-HIPAA okanye amaqabane abo oshishino alawula ulwazi lwezempilo olukhuselweyo (PHI) njengoko kuchazwe kwi-Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act ka-1996 (HIPAA).
noHipaa.details: Nangona i-MindScript isebenzisa amanyathelo okhuseleko aqinileyo (achazwe ngokubanzi kwicandelo lePolisi yaBucala), uyilo lweqonga, ukuphathwa kwedatha kunye neenkqubo zokusebenza zenkonzo jikelele azihlangabezani neemfuno ezithile zokhuseleko lokulawulwa, lomzimba kunye nobugcisa ezifunwa yiMthetho woKhuseleko we-HIPAA ukuphatha i-PHI ngamaqumrhu agqunyethweyo okanye amaqabane oshishino asebenza egameni labo ngaphandle kwesivumelwano esithile se-Business Associate (BAA) esisebenzayo kwimeko ethile yokusetyenziswa.
noHipaa.agreement: Ngokusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuba AWUYI kuyisebenzisa ukugcina, ukusetyenzwa okanye ukudlulisa i-PHI ngendlela efuna ukuthobela i-HIPAA kwicala le-MindScript, ngaphandle kokuba ungene kwi-BAA eyahlukileyo, esebenzayo kunye ne-MindScript Technologies, LLC ngenjongo ethile, ekuvunyelwene ngayo. Uyavuma ukuba umgangatho wokhuseleko lwedatha osebenzayo kulwazi olunikezayo ngumgangatho wezenzo zokhuseleko zoshishino ezifanelekileyo e-United States, hayi imigangatho ethile efunwa yi-HIPAA ye-PHI.

dataSecurity.title: 3. Umda woXanduva Ngokuphathelele kuKhuseleko lweDatha
dataSecurity.content: I-MindScript isebenzisa amanyathelo okhuseleko afanelekileyo ngokwezorhwebo, kubandakanywa iiprothokholi zofihlo kunye nokuqinisekisa (njengoko kuchazwe kwiPolisi yethu yaBucala), ukukhusela ulwazi olunika kwiNkonzo. Noko kunjalo, akukho nkqubo yokhuseleko ingenakungeniwa.
dataSecurity.warning: Ngoko ke, ngokusebenzisa le Sayithi, uyavuma ngokucacileyo kwaye uyavuma ukuba nangona i-MindScript iya kwenza iinzame ezifanelekileyo zokukhusela idatha yakho ngokuhambelana nezenzo eziqhelekileyo zoshishino, ASIQINISEKISI UKHUSELEKO OLUPHELELEYO LOLWAZI LWAKHO. Uyavuma ukuba AWUNAKO kwaye AWUYI kumangalela okanye ubambe i-MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, AMAQUMRHU AYO ADITYANISIWEYO, AMAGOSA, ABALAWULI, ABASEBENZI, II-ARHENTE OKANYE ABANIKEZELI BELAYISENSI banoxanduva lwayo nawuphi na umonakalo, ilahleko, iindleko okanye iindleko ezivela okanye ezinxulumene nakuphi na ukufikelela okungagunyaziswanga, ukusetyenziswa, ukuchazwa, ukuguqulwa okanye ukutshatyalaliswa kolwazi lwakho (kubandakanywa ukwaphulwa kwedatha), ngokuba i-MindScript isebenzise amanyathelo okhuseleko afanelekileyo. Ukusetyenziswa kwakho kweNkonzo kuyakwamkela lo mngcipheko.

generalLiability.title: 4. Umda Jikelele woXanduva
generalLiability.content:
KUDE KUBE KUVUNYELWE NGUMTHETHO OSEBENZAYO, AKUKHO MEKO APHO I-MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, AMAQUMRHU AYO ADITYANISIWEYO, AMAGOSA, ABALAWULI, ABASEBENZI, II-ARHENTE OKANYE ABANIKEZELI BELAYISENSI BAYA KUBA NOXANDUVA LWAYO NAWUPHI NA UMONAKALO ONGATHANGA NGQO, OWENZEKA NGENGOZI, OKHETHEKILEYO, OLANDELAYO OKANYE WESOHLWAYO, OKANYE NAYIPHI NA ILAHLEKO YENZUZO OKANYE INGENISO, NOKUBA YENZEKE NGOKUTHE NGQO OKANYE NGOKUNGATHANGA NGQO, OKANYE NAYIPHI NA ILAHLEKO YEDATHA, UKUSETYENZISWA, IGAMA ELILUNGILEYO, OKANYE EZINYE ILAHLEKO EZINGAPHATHEKIYO, EZIVELA:

UKUFIKELELA KWAKHO OKANYE UKUSETYENZISWA OKANYE UKUNGAKWAZI UKUFIKELELA OKANYE UKUSEBENZISA INKONZO;
NAYIPHI NA INDLELA YOKUZIPHATHA OKANYE UMXHOLO WALO NAWUPHI NA UMNTU WESITHATHU KWINKONZO, KUBANDAKANYWA NGAPHANDLE KOMDA, NAYIPHI NA INDLELA YOKUZIPHATHA EHLABAYO, ECHUBEKISAYO OKANYE ENGEKHO MTHETHWENI YABANYE ABASEBENZISI OKANYE ABANTU BESITHATHU;
NAWUPHI NA UMXHOLO OFUNYENWE KWINKONZO; OKANYE
UKUFIKELELA OKUNGAGUNYAZISWANGA, UKUSETYENZISWA, OKANYE UKUGUQULWA KOKUDLULISWA KWAKHO OKANYE UMXHOLO (KUBANDAKANYWA UKWAPHULWA KWEDATHA), NOBA I-MINDSCRIPT ISEBENZISE AMANYATHELO OKHUSELEKO AFANELEKILEYO NJENGOKO KUCHAZWE KULE MIGAQO NAKWIPOLISI YABUCALA.

KUDE KUBE KUVUNYELWE NGUMTHETHO, I-MINDSCRIPT IYAZIKHABA KUZO ZONKE IIZIQINISEKISO, EZICACILEYO OKANYE EZIFIKELELWEYO, KUBANDAKANYWA, KODWA KUNGAPHELELANGA KUZO, IIZIQINISEKISO EZIFIKELELWEYO ZOKUTHENGISEKA, UKUFANELEKA KWINJONGO ETHILE, ISIHLOKO, KUNYE NOKUNGAPHULI.

AKUKHO MEKO APHO UXANDUVA OLUHLANGANISIWEYO LWE-MINDSCRIPT KUNYE NAMAQUMRHU AYO ADITYANISIWEYO LUYA KUDLULA IKHULU LEEDOLA ZASE-U.S. (USD $100.00) OKANYE ISIXA OSIHLAWULE I-MINDSCRIPT, UKUBA SIKHONA, KWIINYANGA EZINTANDATHU EZIDLULILEYO NGEENKONZO EZIBANGELE IBANGO.

IMIDA YELI CANDELO LINCINCI IYA KUSEBENZA KUYO NAYIPHI NA ITHIYORI YOXANDUVA, NOKUBA ISEKELWE KWISIQINISEKISO, ISIVUMELWANO, UMTHETHO, ITYALA (KUBANDAKANYWA UKUNGAKHATHALI), OKANYE NGENYE INDLELA, KWAYE NOKUBA I-MINDSCRIPT YAZISIWE OKANYE CHA NGOKWENZEKA KWALOO MONAKALO, KWAYE NOBA ISIYALELO ESIBEKWE APHA SIFUNYENWE SINGAPHUMELELANGA INJONGO YASO EBALULEKILEYO.

EZINYE IINDAWO ZOLAWULO AZIVUMELI UKUKHUTSHELWA NGAPHANDLE KWEZIQINISEKISO EZITHILE OKANYE UMDA OKANYE UKUKHUTSHELWA NGAPHANDLE KOXANDUVA LOMONAKALO OWENZEKA NGENGOZI OKANYE OLANDELAYO. NGOKO KE, EMINYE YEMIDA ENGENTLA ISENOKUNGASEBENZI KUWE.

emergency.title: 5. Iimeko zoNgxamiseko
emergency.intro: Ukuba unongxamiseko wezonyango, qhagamshelana neenkonzo zakho zongxamiseko zendawo ngokukhawuleza:
emergency.content: Ungaze uthembele kwi-VirtualMD.app kwizigqibo okanye iimeko zonyango ezingxamisekileyo. INkonzo ayiyilelwanga ukusetyenziswa kungxamiseko kwaye akufanele isetyenziswe kwiimeko ezifuna unyango lwezonyango olukhawulezileyo.

byUser.title: 1. Ukupheliswa nguMsebenzisi
byUser.content: Ungayiphelisa le Migaqo nanini na ngokuyeka ukusebenzisa iNkonzo nokucima iakhawunti yakho (ukuba ikhona). Ukucinywa kweakhawunti kunokucelwa ngokusetyenziswa kwezicwangciso zeakhawunti yakho okanye ngokuqhagamshelana nenkxaso.

byMindScript.title: 2. Ukupheliswa yi-MindScript
byMindScript.content: I-MindScript ingaphelisa okanye inqumamise ukufikelela kwakho kwiNkonzo nanini na nangenxa yesizathu esifunekayo, kubandakanywa, kodwa kungaphelelanga ekwaphuleni le Migaqo, umsebenzi wobuqhophololo, ukungasebenzi ixesha elide okanye ngokubona kwethu. Xa kunokwenzeka, siya kuzama ukukwazisa ngokupheliswa okunjalo.

effectOfTermination.title: 3. Isiphumo sokuPheliswa
effectOfTermination.content: Emva kokupheliswa, ilungelo lakho lokusebenzisa iNkonzo liya kuphela ngokukhawuleza. Onke amalungiselelo eMigaqo okufanele aphile ukupheliswa ngokwendalo yawo aya kuphila emva kokupheliswa, kubandakanywa, ngaphandle komda, amalungiselelo obunini, ukuzikhaba kwiziqinisekiso, imbuyekezo kunye nemida yoxanduva. I-MindScript ayiyi kuba noxanduva kuwe okanye kuye nawuphi na umntu wesithathu ngokupheliswa kokufikelela kwakho kwiNkonzo.

changesToTerms.title: Utshintsho kwiMigaqo
changesToTerms.content:
I-MindScript igcina ilungelo lokuguqula okanye ukubuyisela le Migaqo nanini na ngokubona kwayo yodwa. Ukuba uhlaziyo lubalulekile, siya kunika isaziso seentsuku ezingama-30 ubuncinane ngaphambi kokuba nayiphi na imigaqo emitsha iqalise ukusebenza ngokupapasha imigaqo emitsha kwiNkonzo nokuhlaziya umhla "wokuGqitywa ukuhlaziywa" phezulu kweMigaqo.

Into eyenza utshintsho olubalulekileyo iya kumiselwa ngokubona kwethu yodwa. Ngokuqhubeka ukufikelela okanye ukusebenzisa iNkonzo yethu emva kokuba ezo zigqibo ziqalise ukusebenza, uyavuma ukubotshelelwa yimigaqo ehlaziyiweyo. Ukuba awuvumelani nemigaqo emitsha, nceda uyeke ukusebenzisa iNkonzo.

law.title: 1. Umthetho oLawulayo
law.content: Le Migaqo iya kulawulwa kwaye ichazwe ngokuhambelana nemithetho yePhondo laseDelaware, ngaphandle kokujonga imigaqo yalo yongquzulwano lomthetho.

disputes.title: 2. Ukusombululwa kweeMbambano
disputes.content: Nayiphi na imbambano evela okanye enxulumene nale Migaqo okanye iNkonzo iya kusonjululwa kuphela kwiinkundla zelizwe okanye zomanyano ezinegunya ezikwi-Massachusetts, kwaye amaqela ayavuma kulawulo lomntu lwezo nkundla.

entireAgreement.title: 1. Isivumelwano Siphelele
entireAgreement.content: Le Migaqo kunye nePolisi yethu yaBucala yenza isivumelwano esipheleleyo phakathi kwakho kunye ne-MindScript Technologies, LLC malunga neNkonzo kwaye ithatha indawo yazo naziphi na izivumelwano zangaphambili.

severability.title: 2. Ukwahlulwa
severability.content: Ukuba naliphi na ilungiselelo lale Migaqo lifunyenwe lingasebenzi okanye lingenakuphunyezwa, elo lungiselelo liya kuthintelwa okanye lisuswe kangangoko kufuneka ukuze le Migaqo isebenze ngokupheleleyo.

waiver.title: 3. Ukuyeka
waiver.content: Ukusilela kwe-MindScript ukunyanzelisa naliphi na ilungelo okanye ilungiselelo lale Migaqo akuyi kuthathwa njengokuyeka elo lungelo okanye ilungiselelo.

assignment.title: 4. Isabelo
assignment.content: Awunakwabela okanye ukudlulisela le Migaqo, kodwa i-MindScript ingayabela okanye iyidlulisele ngaphandle komda.

notices.title: 5. Izaziso
notices.content: I-MindScript ingakunika izaziso nge-imeyile, iposi eqhelekileyo okanye ukupapasha kwiNkonzo, kubandakanywa izaziso malunga notshintsho kwiMigaqo.

privacyPolicy.title: IPolisi yaBucala
privacyPolicy.introduction: I-MindScript Technologies, LLC ("MindScript", "thina", "wethu") izibophelele ekukhuseleni ubucala bakho. Le Polisi yaBucala ichaza indlela esiqokelela ngayo, esisebenzisa ngayo, esichaza ngayo nesikhusela ngayo ulwazi olunxulumene nenkonzo yethu ye-VirtualMD.app ("iNkonzo").

accountInformation.title: Ulwazi lweAkhawunti
accountInformation.content: Xa wenza iakhawunti, siqokelela igama lakho, idilesi ye-imeyile kunye nephasiwedi. Unokukhetha ukunika ulwazi lweprofayile olongezelelweyo.

conversationData.title: Idatha yeNcoko
conversationData.content: Sigcina iincoko zakho kunye nee-personas ze-AI ukubonelela ngeNkonzo nokugcina imbali yencoko yakho. Oku kunokubandakanya ulwazi olunxulumene nempilo owabelana ngalo ngexesha leencoko.

usageInformation.title: Ulwazi lokuSetyenziswa
usageInformation.content: Siqokelela ngokuzenzekelayo ulwazi malunga nendlela onxibelelana ngayo neNkonzo, kubandakanywa idilesi ye-IP, uhlobo lwesikhangeli, amaphepha atyelelweyo kunye namaxesha okufikelela.

technicalData.title: Idatha yoBugcisa
technicalData.content: Siqokelela ulwazi lwesixhobo, idatha yelog kunye nedatha yohlalutyo efunyenwe ngee-cookies kunye nobugcisa obufanayo.

howWeUseInformation.title: 2. Indlela esiSebenzisa ngayo uLwazi
purposes: Senze ngokwakho amava akho kwaye sikhumbule izinto ozikhethayo
Sibeke iliso kwaye sihlalutye iipatheni kunye neentsingiselo zokusetyenziswa
Sibone, sithintele kwaye sisombulule iingxaki zobugcisa

dataRetention.title: 3. Ukugcinwa kweDatha
dataRetention.content: Sigcina ulwazi lwakho ixesha elifunekayo ukubonelela ngeNkonzo nokufezekisa iinjongo ezichazwe kulo mgaqo. Iimbali zencoko zigcinwa de uzicime okanye iakhawunti yakho ipheliswe. Ungacima iincoko nganye okanye yonke imbali yencoko yakho nanini na ngokusetyenziswa kwezicwangciso zeakhawunti yakho.

dataSecurity.title: 4. Ukhuseleko lweDatha
dataSecurity.measures: Sisebenzisa amanyathelo okhuseleko afanelekileyo ngokwezorhwebo ukukhusela ulwazi lwakho, kubandakanywa:
dataSecurity.warning: Nangona sizama ukukhusela ulwazi lwakho, akukho nkqubo yokhuseleko ingenakungeniwa kwaye asinakuqinisekisa ukhuseleko olupheleleyo.

dataSharing.title: 5. Ukwabelana kunye nokuChazwa kweDatha
dataSharing.intro: Asithengisi, asirhwebi okanye asiqeshi ulwazi lwakho lobuqu. Singabelana ngolwazi kwiimeko ezilandelayo:
circumstances: Kunye nababoneleli beenkonzo abasinceda ukubonelela ngeNkonzo (bephantsi kwezibophelelo zemfihlo)
Ukuthobela izibophelelo zomthetho okanye ukuphendula kwizicelo ezisemthethweni
Ukukhusela amalungelo, ipropati okanye ukhuseleko lwe-MindScript, abasebenzisi bethu okanye uluntu
Ngokunxulumene nokudityaniswa, ukuthengiswa kwee-asethi okanye ukufunyanwa okubandakanya yonke okanye inxalenye yoshishino lwethu

yourRights.title: 6. Amalungelo akho kunye nokuKhetha
rights: Ukucima iakhawunti yakho kunye nedatha enxulumene nayo
yourRights.exerciseRights: Ukusebenzisa la malungelo, sebenzisa useto lweakhawunti yakho okanye uqhagamshelane nathi ku: support@virtualmd.app

cookies.title: 7. Ii-Cookies kunye noBugcisa bokuLandelela
cookies.content: Sisebenzisa ii-cookies kunye nobugcisa obufanayo ukugcina iiseshoni, ukukhumbula izinto ozikhethayo kunye nokuhlalutya ukusetyenziswa. Ungalawula ii-cookies ngokusebenzisa useto lwesikhangeli sakho, kodwa ukuzivala kunokuchaphazela ukusebenza kweNkonzo.

childrenPrivacy.title: 8. Ubucala baBantwana
childrenPrivacy.content: INkonzo ayijolisanga kubantu abangaphantsi kweminyaka eli-18 ubudala. Asiqokeleli ngabom ulwazi lobuqu lwabantwana abangaphantsi kweminyaka eli-18. Ukuba sifumanisa ukuba siqokelele ulwazi lobuqu lomntwana, siya kuthatha amanyathelo okucima olo lwazi.

internationalTransfers.title: 9. Ukudluliselwa kweDatha kwaManye amazwe
internationalTransfers.content: Ulwazi lwakho lungadluliselwa kwaye lugcinwe kwiiseva e-United States. Ukuba usebenzisa iNkonzo ukusuka kwezinye iindawo zolawulo, uyavuma ukudluliselwa kolwazi lwakho e-United States, enokuba nemithetho yokhuselo lwedatha eyahlukileyo kuleyo yelizwe lakho.

californiaRights.title: 10. Amalungelo aBemi baseCalifornia
californiaRights.content: Abemi baseCalifornia banamalungelo ongezelelweyo phantsi kwe-CCPA, kubandakanywa ilungelo lokwazi ukuba loluphi ulwazi lobuqu oluqokelelweyo, ukucela ukucinywa nokukhetha ukungathengisi ulwazi lobuqu (asithengisi ulwazi lobuqu). Ukusebenzisa la malungelo, qhagamshelana: privacy@virtualmd.app

changesToPolicy.title: 11. Utshintsho kulo Mgaqo
changesToPolicy.content: Singahlaziya le Polisi yaBucala ngamaxesha athile. Siya kukwazisa ngalo naluphi na utshintsho ngokupapasha iPolisi yaBucala entsha kwiNkonzo nokuhlaziya umhla "wokuGqitywa ukuhlaziywa". Utshintsho olubalulekileyo luya kunxityelelwa nge-imeyile okanye ngesaziso esicacileyo kwiNkonzo.

contact.title: 12. Qhagamshelana Nathi
contact.content: Ukuba unemibuzo malunga nale Polisi yaBucala, nceda uqhagamshelane nathi:
contact.details:
MindScript Technologies, LLC
I-imeyile: privacy@virtualmd.app
Idilesi: [Faka idilesi yokwenene]

accessibility.title: Ingxelo yokuFikelela
accessibility.content: I-MindScript izibophelele ekuqinisekiseni ukufikelela kwedijithali kubantu abakhubazekileyo. Siphucula ngokuqhubekayo amava omsebenzisi kubo bonke kwaye sisebenzisa imigangatho yokufikelela efanelekileyo. Ukuba uhlangabezana neengxaki zokufikelela, nceda uqhagamshelane: accessibility@virtualmd.app

dmca.title: Umgaqo-nkqubo we-DMCA
dmca.content: I-MindScript iyawahlonipha amalungelo obunini bengqondo babanye. Ukuba ukholelwa ukuba umsebenzi wakho okhuselwe lilungelo lokushicilela ukhutshelwe ngendlela eyenza ukwaphulwa kwelungelo lokushicilela, thumela isaziso esiqulathe ulwazi olufunwa yi-DMCA kwi-arhente yethu yelungelo lokushicilela: copyright@virtualmd.app

exportCompliance.title: Ukuthobela ukuThumela ngaphandle
exportCompliance.content: Awunakusebenzisa, uthumele ngaphandle okanye uphinde uthumele ngaphandle iNkonzo okanye nayiphi na inxalenye yayo ngokwaphula imithetho kunye nemimiselo yokuthumela ngaphandle yase-U.S. Uyachaza ukuba awukho kuluhlu lwe-U.S. government lokuthintelwa okanye ukuvalwa.

thirdPartyLinks.title: Amakhonkco aQumrhu lesithathu
thirdPartyLinks.content: INkonzo inokuqulatha amakhonkco eewebhusayithi okanye iinkonzo zeqela lesithathu. I-MindScript ayinaxanduva lomxholo, imigaqo-nkqubo yabucala okanye izenzo zawo nawaphi na amawebhusayithi okanye iinkonzo zeqela lesithathu. Uyavuma kwaye uyavuma ukuba i-MindScript ayinaxanduva lwayo nawuphi na umonakalo okanye ilahleko ebangelwa kukusetyenziswa kwakho kwezi webhusayithi okanye iinkonzo.
